prompt: use the B-roll and make a promo video
use B-Roll to create a promo video

The Christman AI Project has been accepted into Claude for Startups by Anthropic. Built on a disability check, led by a neurodivergent founder, AI designed for the people the industry forgot. This is what it looks like when you refuse to quit.

AlphaVox by The Christman AI Project — AI-powered communication for nonverbal and autistic individuals. Symbol-based, adaptive, works offline. Because communication is a human right, not a premium feature.

AlphaWolf — cognitive support AI for dementia patients. Memory prompts, geolocation safety, emotional reassurance. Built so that no one loses their dignity along with their memories. The Christman AI Project.

Inferno AI — trauma-informed support for PTSD and anxiety recovery. Daily check-ins, grounding techniques, crisis-intervention logic. Healing should be accessible, private, and constant. Luma Cognify AI.

Aegis AI — child protection powered by artificial intelligence. Monitoring exploitation, trafficking, and online abuse. School safety, geolocation alerts, emergency response. Our children deserve more than protection — they deserve peace.

OmegaAlpha — AI companionship for seniors. Fall detection, medication reminders, emotional engagement, daily structure. Because aging with dignity should be a right, not a privilege. The Christman AI Project.

Luma Cognify AI — ethical technology from the margins, for the world. We build AI that empowers, protects, and redefines what humanity looks like when no one gets left behind. How can we help you love yourself more?
